title: Dashboard
description: A dashboard is a collection of tiles arranged in a layout that visualize data from queries. Dashboards support cross-filtering, drill-down, and can be shared, embedded, or scheduled.

id.description: Unique identifier. Numeric for user-defined dashboards; model::dashboard_name for LookML dashboards.

content_metadata_id.description: ID of the content metadata record

query_timezone.description: Timezone for queries on this dashboard

space_id.description: ID of the space (folder) containing this dashboard

folder_id.description: ID of the folder containing this dashboard

user_id.description: ID of the user who created this dashboard

dashboard_elements.description: List of tiles (elements) on this dashboard

dashboard_filters.description: List of filters on this dashboard

background_color.description: CSS background color for the dashboard

text_tile_text_color.description: Default text color for text tiles

hidden.description: Whether this dashboard is hidden from navigation

readonly.description: Whether this dashboard is read-only (LookML dashboards are read-only)

load_configuration.description: Dashboard load configuration. Controls whether tiles load concurrently or sequentially.

preferred_viewer.description: Preferred viewer type for the dashboard

created_at.description: Timestamp when the dashboard was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the dashboard was last updated

deleted_at.description: Timestamp when the dashboard was soft-deleted

deleted.description: Whether this dashboard has been soft-deleted

last_accessed_at.description: Timestamp when the dashboard was last viewed

view_count.description: Number of times the dashboard has been viewed

favorite_count.description: Number of users who have favorited this dashboard

url.description: Relative URL path for this dashboard
